frontmatter.name: elementor-headless
frontmatter.description: Build and modify Elementor pages by writing the underlying JSON directly - no visual editor, no DOM. Query the full control surface (37,964 controls across 135 widgets and 3 elements) instead of reading Elementor's source, with every Elementor Pro-only control explicitly labeled from a measured Free-vs-Pro diff.
frontmatter.author: moksa (https://moksaweb.com)

loaderBehaviour: Upload via Settings -> Skills -> Upload. Claude.ai parses SKILL.md frontmatter and surfaces the skill in your library. The extraction tool (extract-elementor-schema.php) needs a live WP-CLI connection and won't run in the sandbox; use it from a local terminal against your own site instead.
uploadSteps: 3. Pick the generated zip; the skill appears in your library
4. New chats auto-invoke when you ask to build/modify an Elementor page programmatically
